# Stone.js

> The Continuum framework. Write your domain once; it lives in superposition across every execution context (server, edge, browser, agents) and collapses into one at runtime. Stone.js is the reference implementation of the Continuum Architecture: an application is an act, Domain times Context resolves into a Resolution. You write the domain; adapters supply the context at runtime, so the same code runs on Node, AWS Lambda, Cloudflare, Deno, Bun, the browser, and AI agents.

Two paradigms are supported at strict parity: declarative (TC39 stage-3 decorators with Symbol.metadata) and imperative (define* meta-modules). Three forms everywhere: class, factory, function.

## Start here
- [Why Stone.js](/docs): an application is an act, not an object; the thesis in three minutes.
- [Install and create](/docs/start/install): scaffold with npm create @stone-js, then run locally.

## Foundations (the architecture)
- [The Continuum](/docs/foundations/continuum): the app as an act; the four dimensions (Setup, Integration, Initialization, Functional).
- [Domain times Context resolves into Resolution](/docs/foundations/domain-context): keep the domain pure, let the context arrive.
- [The uncertainty principle](/docs/foundations/uncertainty): defer the where, own the what.

## Contexts (the dimensions; the same domain, collapsed differently)
- [Backend](/docs/contexts/backend): Node HTTP and CLI adapters on one domain.
- [Frontend](/docs/contexts/frontend): React pages and layouts; CSR, SSR, SSG.
- [Edge and Serverless](/docs/contexts/edge): one Web-standard adapter for Cloudflare, Deno, Bun, Vercel, Netlify; plus AWS Lambda.
- [Agents](/docs/contexts/agents): expose the domain as MCP tools.

## Build (recipes)
- [Config and environment](/docs/build/config): the Blueprint manifest; typed environment access.
- [Routing](/docs/build/routing): one universal router for server and browser.
- [Validation](/docs/build/validation): one schema, enforced on the API and the form.
- [Auth and authorization](/docs/build/auth): stateless JWT/OAuth; isomorphic RBAC and ABAC.
- [Resources and OpenAPI](/docs/build/resources): shape the output; derive the public contract.
- [Testing](/docs/build/testing): boot the real app in memory; dispatch real events.

## Frontier (advanced)
- [Write your own adapter](/docs/frontier/adapter): open a new context in three verbs.
- [Universal apps](/docs/frontier/universal): SSR as a superposition of browser and server.
- [Agent-native patterns](/docs/frontier/agent-native): design a domain machines can use well.

## Ecosystem
- [Marketplace](/docs/ecosystem): the full catalog, grouped by role in the architecture.

## Optional
- [The Continuum manifesto](https://evens-stone.github.io/continuum-manifesto/manifesto): the philosophy behind the framework.
